testcase.name: test_script_syntax_valid

failure.message:
AssertionError: Syntax error: /bin/bash: C:UsersyooncCapstone-Design-1scriptsentrypoint.sh: No such file or directory
assert 127 == 0 + where 127 = CompletedProcess(args=['bash', '-n', 'C:\\Users\\yoonc\\Capstone-Design-1\\scripts\\entrypoint.sh'], returncode=127, stdout='', stderr='/bin/bash: C:UsersyooncCapstone-Design-1scriptsentrypoint.sh: No such file or directory\n').returncode

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: Syntax error: /bin/bash: C:UsersyooncCapstone-Design-1scriptsentrypoint.sh: No such file or directory
assert 127 == 0 + where 127 = CompletedProcess(args=['bash', '-n', 'C:\\Users\\yoonc\\Capstone-Design-1\\scripts\\entrypoint.sh'], returncode=127, stdout='', stderr='/bin/bash: C:UsersyooncCapstone-Design-1scriptsentrypoint.sh: No such file or directory\n').returncode
